headline: Prosecutors used ChatGPT logs as evidence in the Palisades fire trial
summary: ChatGPT logs were used as evidence in a deadly LA wildfire arson trial. Jonathan Rinderknecht faced charges for a 2025 New Year's Day fire. This marks a new frontier for AI's role in criminal investigations.

headline: Nest’s quest to fix your thermostat
summary: The founding story of Nest, led by iPhone co-creator Tony Fadell, is explored. Fadell aimed to revolutionize the home thermostat after his Apple success. Nest sought to bring smart design and technology to a neglected appliance.

headline: Ad-free streaming is a luxury now
summary: Streaming services, once ad-free, are increasingly introducing commercials. Ad-free viewing is now becoming a premium, paid-for luxury option. This shift marks a significant change from streaming's original promise.

headline: TMD’s keyless bike lock is a $280 solution to a $60 problem
summary: A new $280 keyless bike lock from TMD is reviewed. The lock boasts robust materials and ART-2 certification for insurance. The article questions if its high cost justifies the "smart" features.

headline: The Invincible VS Devs Would Love a Mortal Kombat Crossover
summary: Developers of Invincible VS are keen on crossover collaborations with other IPs. They specifically expressed interest in characters from the Mortal Kombat franchise. This could hint at future exciting fighting game mashups.

headline: GTA 6 Scalpers Are Finding Buyers on eBay Despite Rockstar's Commitment to a Digital Release
summary: GTA 6 scalpers are selling pre-orders on eBay despite the game being digital-only. Fans are paying extra even though there's no physical product to secure. This highlights persistent demand and confusion surrounding the upcoming release.

headline: Street Fighter 6 Devs Have No Current Plans to Make Any Major Adjustments to System Mechanics | Evo 2026
summary: Street Fighter 6 developers confirm no major system mechanic changes are currently planned. The game's current state and future were discussed at Evo 2026. This reassures players that core gameplay will remain stable for now.

headline: Supergirl Director Credits James Gunn for Helping Choose Song for Much-Discussed Slow-Motion Fight Scene
summary: Supergirl director Craig Gillespie credits James Gunn for a fight scene's song choice. The slow-motion fight scene has generated significant social media buzz. Gunn's influence played a role in a key cinematic moment.

headline: Two boys rescued from Venezuela earthquake rubble after days of being trapped
summary: Two boys were dramatically rescued from earthquake rubble in Venezuela. Rescuers spent six hours digging to free one child. Many residents continue searching by hand awaiting heavy machinery.

headline: Eleven killed after plane carrying skydivers crashes in eastern France
summary: A plane carrying skydivers crashed in eastern France, killing 11 people. The incident claimed the lives of the pilot and ten passengers. Local officials confirmed the fatalities.

headline: World Cup knockouts are here - what is England's path to the final?
summary: England has qualified for the World Cup knockout stages. The article analyzes England's potential path to the final match. Fans are eager to see if England can secure a spot in the championship.

headline: Senior Labour figures say party is united behind Andy Burnham
summary: Senior Labour figures indicate strong party unity behind Andy Burnham. Lucy Powell and Steve Reed suggest a "coronation" rather than a leadership contest. Burnham appears to have widespread backing from Labour MPs.
